case_title: REID, CARETH vs. HOWARD, LAURA et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $103.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT HOWARD, LAURA
